metadata.name: Mobile Troubleshooting - Wi-Fi Hotspot Not Working

description: A customer is trying to use their phone as a Wi-Fi hotspot, but other devices cannot connect.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's plan includes a mobile hotspot feature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the plan has hotspot capability.

nodes.task_description: Guide the customer to check their hotspot settings on their phone, including the password and network name (SSID).

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear instructions for checking hotspot settings.

nodes.task_description: Reset the network settings on the customer's device to resolve any configuration glitches.

expected_outcome.value: Agent guides the customer through a network settings reset.
